hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Professional clean residential house exterior freshly washed, light colored siding gleaming, blue sky, sprawling lawn, photorealistic, no people, no text.
hero.caption_context: Before/after is THE conversion driver for pressure washing. If photos with side-by-side are available, use those in hero. Caption reinforces 17-year history or Sheridan's personal involvement.

gallery.context: House siding before + after wash. Caption 'House washing — moss, dirt, stains, gone'.
Roof cleaning before + after (black streaks removed). Caption 'Roof cleaning — soft wash, no damage'.
Concrete driveway or walkway pressure-washed. Caption 'Concrete + driveways — years of grime, one afternoon'.
Gutter cleaning or downspout flush. Caption 'Gutters — flushed, not just surface-cleaned'.
Gas station or parking lot commercial job (differentiator from residential-only competitors). Caption 'Commercial — gas stations, lots, post-construction'.
Sheridan personally with equipment or team. Caption naming him if it's him — reinforces 17-year owner-operator angle.

sections.context: Sandy Springs / North Atlanta streetscape; Unsplash OK

notes: Pressure washing vertical = before/after photos are the single biggest conversion driver. If Bruce surfaces before/after pairs, prioritize those in hero + gallery slots 1-3. Sheridan's 17-year owner-operator presence is a rare trust signal at this scale — wire him into the team/about section. Gas station + commercial work opens a B2B outreach angle worth preserving in gallery slot 5.
